query:
SELECT mr.*, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting_request_participants WHERE meeting_request_id = mr.id) as participant_count
FROM meeting_requests mr 
ORDER BY mr.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27sEaT2BZNqjVK1.3777d857e0cd --database JfuWbL5SX5FRFCFWK9F3WU --execute SELECT mr.*, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting_request_participants WHERE meeting_request_id = mr.id) as participant_count
FROM meeting_requests mr 
ORDER BY mr.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
